diff: Only an operator with the admin role is able to set unlimited rate limit data for a specific key by configuring it with maximum values. Calling this function will carry out the following actions:
- The contract will call setRateLimitData internally with type(uint256).max for maxAmount and lastAmount, 0 for slope, and the current block timestamp for lastUpdated.
The function call is as follows:
